title: Customer Engagement Automation Platform
code:
campaign = mailchimp.create_campaign(...)
html = load_template_from_s3()
audience = build_salesforce_audience()
mailchimp.schedule(campaign, send_time)

bullets.label: 🚀 End-to-End Ownership
bullets.text: Owned the complete customer engagement workflow, including campaign creation, audience management, automation, performance tracking, and stakeholder reporting.

bullets.label: 📬 Campaign Engineering
bullets.text: Built and managed custom email campaigns using Python automation, extending MailChimp beyond native platform capabilities to support business requirements.

bullets.label: ☁️ Dynamic Content Delivery
bullets.text: Managed HTML email templates stored in AWS S3 and dynamically incorporated content into outbound campaigns and scheduled communications.

bullets.label: 🔗 Data Integration
bullets.text: Combined Salesforce and MailChimp datasets to create a unified view of customer engagement, campaign activity, and audience performance.

bullets.label: 📊 Internal Analytics
bullets.text: Developed dashboards and recurring reports used during weekly stakeholder meetings to review campaign effectiveness, customer engagement trends, and business metrics.

bullets.label: 📈 Observability Dashboard
bullets.text: Designed and built the company's first data quality and pipeline health dashboard, providing visibility into production data processing and operational performance.

bullets.label: 🔍 Root Cause Analysis
bullets.text: Investigated pipeline failures, data anomalies, and processing issues by analyzing streaming workflows and production datasets.

bullets.label: 🧹 Data Quality Improvements
bullets.text: Identified and resolved bond matching and duplicate record issues, reducing duplicate entries by approximately 20%.

bullets.label: ⚡ Streaming Operations
bullets.text: Supported real-time market data pipelines running throughout trading hours, ensuring reliable delivery of analytics and reporting datasets.

title: Databricks Backup & Recovery Platform
code:
query_json = export_query(query_id)

s3.put_object(
  Bucket=bucket_name,
  Key=backup_key,
  Body=query_json
)

bullets.label: 🧰 Automated Backups
bullets.text: Built a Python-based platform that automatically backed up Databricks query assets and metadata to Amazon S3 on a daily schedule.

bullets.label: 🔗 Databricks API Integration
bullets.text: Leveraged the Databricks API to export and manage analytics assets, reducing manual recovery effort and improving operational resilience.

bullets.label: 📋 Self-Service Visibility
bullets.text: Generated spreadsheet-based inventory reports alongside cloud backups, allowing teams to quickly review assets without navigating S3 storage directly.

bullets.label: 🚑 Recovery & Continuity
bullets.text: Maintained two weeks of recoverable daily snapshots, supporting data safety, accessibility, and business continuity for analytics operations.

title: Google I/O 2026

bullets.label: 🧩 Component Engineering
bullets.text: Built and enhanced Lit-based web components integrated with CMS-driven content across the Google I/O platform.

bullets.label: 🎨 Front-End Development
bullets.text: Implemented responsive user experiences using TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Eleventy, supporting high-traffic event content and registration flows.

bullets.label: ♿ Accessibility
bullets.text: Contributed accessibility improvements including keyboard navigation, screen-reader support, ARIA enhancements, and reduced-motion experiences.

bullets.label: 📊 Analytics & Instrumentation
bullets.text: Implemented analytics tracking and user interaction instrumentation to support measurement of engagement and platform usage.

bullets.label: 🚀 Production Launches
bullets.text: Supported multiple Google I/O launch phases through code reviews, testing, bug fixes, and coordinated production deployments.

title: Sustainability Reporting Platform
code:
-- Validate reporting counts
SELECT reporting_year,
       COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM sustainability_reporting
GROUP BY reporting_year;

bullets.label: 📅 Multi-Year Data Validation
bullets.text: Loaded, validated, and reconciled sustainability reporting data spanning reporting years 2019–2024, ensuring accurate historical reporting across multiple enterprise systems.

bullets.label: 🧹 Data Quality & Reconciliation
bullets.text: Investigated discrepancies, duplicate records, and reporting exceptions to improve the accuracy, consistency, and reliability of enterprise sustainability datasets.

bullets.label: ⚙️ Enterprise Workflow Operations
bullets.text: Executed and validated reporting workflows across development, staging, and production environments, creating snapshots and verifying results before releases.

bullets.label: 📊 Reporting Validation
bullets.text: Verified reporting outputs, record counts, and system consistency to support sustainability reporting initiatives and ensure confidence in published results.

bullets.label: 🤝 Cross-Functional Collaboration
bullets.text: Partnered with business and technical stakeholders to investigate issues, validate requirements, prioritize work, and support operational reporting needs.

bullets.label: 📱 Mobile Platform Foundations
bullets.text: Contributed to the early architecture of a mobile application, helping define how application content and user data would be structured and delivered.

bullets.label: 🗂 Data Modeling
bullets.text: Designed approaches for managing onboarding content, user agreements, instructional resources, and application data required before user interaction.

bullets.label: 🛠 Environment Automation
bullets.text: Built automation tooling that generated and populated application data structures while supporting rapid development and testing workflows.

bullets.label: 🧪 Test Environment Management
bullets.text: Developed teardown and rebuild processes that reset application datasets and supported repeatable testing during early product development.

title: Barkey Pet Sitting Website

bullets.label: 🐾 Custom Client Website
bullets.text: Designed and developed a custom multi-page website for a local pet sitting business, translating the client's brand, personality, services, and goals into a polished, responsive online presence.

bullets.label: 🎨 Brand Identity & User Experience
bullets.text: Created a cohesive visual identity using custom illustrations, typography, color palettes, and reusable interface components to build a memorable and approachable brand.

bullets.label: 💻 Responsive Web Development
bullets.text: Built responsive HTML, CSS, and JavaScript experiences including service pages, FAQs, contact forms, payment information, resource pages, and mobile-friendly navigation.

bullets.label: ⚙️ Business Operations
bullets.text: Integrated contact forms, payment workflows, client agreements, analytics, and supporting business resources to simplify communication and improve day-to-day operations.

bullets.label: 🔧 Ongoing Maintenance & Support
bullets.text: Continue maintaining the website through content updates, accessibility improvements, feature enhancements, quality assurance, and technical support as the business evolves.

title: District Files
code:
python run_district_pipeline.py

git push origin main
# GitHub Actions generates updated district files

bullets.label: 🗺️ Civic Data Pipeline
bullets.text: Maintains scheduled workflows, repository operations, release management, and contributor documentation for the District Files project.

bullets.label: ⚙️ Automation & Operations
bullets.text: Owns ongoing maintenance of scheduled workflows, data generation processes, repository operations, and release management.

bullets.label: 📦 Open Data Distribution
bullets.text: Produces machine-readable geographic datasets including GeoJSON and JSON outputs that support mapping, analysis, and civic applications.

bullets.label: 🤝 Open Source Collaboration
bullets.text: Collaborates with volunteers across engineering, product, and data teams to improve accessibility and reliability of public-interest datasets.

title: Airthings Dashboard
code:
python save_raw_readings.py
python app.py
# Dashboard updates automatically from Airthings API

bullets.label: 🌬️ Environmental Data Platform
bullets.text: Built a monitoring platform that collects indoor air quality measurements from Airthings devices, stores historical readings, and visualizes long-term environmental trends.

bullets.label: ⚙️ Automated Data Pipeline
bullets.text: Developed scheduled Python ingestion workflows that retrieve sensor data from the Airthings API and persist readings into MongoDB Atlas with duplicate protection and time-series indexing.

bullets.label: 📊 Analytics Dashboard
bullets.text: Created a Streamlit and Plotly dashboard to explore VOC, particulate matter, temperature, humidity, and other environmental metrics through hover inspection and historical trend analysis.

bullets.label: 🖥️ Linux Infrastructure
bullets.text: Configured a self-hosted Ubuntu Server environment using Docker, cron jobs, and SSH administration to support continuous data collection and dashboard availability.
